test_create_user_success
tests.code:
def test_create_user_success():
    mock_db = Mock()
    service = UserService(mock_db)
    result = service.create_user("Alice", "alice@example.com")
    mock_db.insert.assert_called_once_with({"name": "Alice", "email": "alice@example.com"})

tests.name: test_create_user_empty_name_raises
tests.code:
def test_create_user_empty_name_raises():
    service = UserService(Mock())
    with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="Name and email required"):
        service.create_user("", "alice@example.com")

tests.name: test_create_user_empty_email_raises
tests.code:
def test_create_user_empty_email_raises():
    service = UserService(Mock())
    with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="Name and email required"):
        service.create_user("Alice", "")

test_stack_push_pop
tests.code:
def test_stack_push_pop():
    stack = Stack()
    stack.push(1)
    stack.push(2)
    assert stack.pop() == 2
    assert stack.pop() == 1

tests.name: test_stack_pop_empty_raises
tests.code:
def test_stack_pop_empty_raises():
    stack = Stack()
    with pytest.raises(IndexError, match="Pop from empty stack"):
        stack.pop()

test_stack_is_empty_false_after_push
tests.code:
def test_stack_is_empty_false_after_push():
    stack = Stack()
    stack.push(1)
    assert stack.is_empty() is False
